title: Scrub man pages for long vs short option ordering
body:
**kind bug**

**Description**

As fixed and reported in #2097, the podman-create and podman-run man pages list the short variant of an option before the longer variant.  i.e. `**-w, --workdir**=""`.  This is a low level issue to scrub these and the remaining man pages to ensure the odering is long form is listed first.


**Output of `podman version`:**

```
0.12.1
```
